---
name: Icon Request
about: Request a new icon for an AI/ML/data concept
title: "[Icon Request] "
labels: icon-request, good first issue
---

## Concept Name
<!-- e.g. "Vector Database", "Fine-Tuning", "RAG Pipeline" -->

## Why This Icon Is Needed
<!-- Where would this icon be used? What's the use case? -->

## Concept Explanation (if you can provide one)
<!-- 1-2 sentence plain-English explanation of the concept -->

## Visual Idea (optional)
<!-- Any rough idea for what the icon could look like? Sketches, references, or similar icons in other sets are welcome. -->

## Are you willing to draw this icon yourself?
- [ ] Yes, I'll submit the SVG
- [ ] No, but I can help write the concept explainer
- [ ] Just requesting — open for anyone to pick up
